description: The approved device for holding copy in masthead positions must be the masthead gradient (Sunshine to CMYK: 0C, 10M, 78Y, 0K) with the brand logo mark strictly placed at the lightest end of the gradient.

quotes: Masthead gradient with logo mark (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.
**Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.
Masthead gradient with logo mark (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

intent: Ensure consistent rendering and placement of the masthead background device and brand logo mark in header positions.
rule_text: The approved device for holding copy in masthead positions must be a masthead gradient with the logo mark (Sunshine -> 0C,10M,78Y,0K gradient), with the logo mark placed strictly at the lightest end of the gradient.

quotes: Usage: alone, or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds; to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth. Approved color values only.
Construction: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) — always preserve the layered, translucent quality.
Construction: top wave layer at 70% transparency over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) — always preserve the layered, translucent quality.
Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
Fluid wave forms in two colorways: Sunshine/Gold and Sky Blue/Deep Blue; each in long and short variants.

intent: Maintain visual consistency, brand recognition, and translucent depth of the signature wave elements.
rule_text: Fluid wave graphic elements must be styled in one of two colorways (Sunshine/Gold or Sky Blue/Deep Blue) and in either long or short variants. The top wave layer must have 70% transparency (opacity.logo.gold = 0.7) layered over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine, or Sky Blue over Deep Blue) to preserve its translucent quality.
